revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-6-110

A covering, consisting of metal tapes or wires, used to provide mechanical protection to the cable.


Note: A cable with armour is called an armoured cable.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Armour (of a cable)}}
